field.label: Enable Public (Anonymous) Tools
field.comment: Allows anonymous MCP clients to call the public catalog tools (product_search, product_get, etc). These expose only storefront-visible data, and anonymous calls are rate-limited per IP. Disable to require an admin login for every tool call; tool discovery (tools/list) stays open either way. Enabled by default.

field.label: Enable Write Tools
field.comment: Allows MCP clients to create catalog data (category_create, product_create). Callers still need an authenticated admin with the matching ACL rights; this switch controls whether write tools are exposed at all. Disabled by default.

field.label: Log Full Request/Response Bodies (Debug)
field.comment: Logs the complete JSON-RPC request and response bodies to var/log/mcp.log at debug level. May include personal data (customer emails, order numbers, etc). Keep disabled in production; enable only temporarily while debugging a client connection.
